title: ArcadiaFi - Rekt
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by rebalance action with arbitrary swapData on rebalancer contract

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls flashAction() after a flash loan in the same tx

red_flags: Unusual rebalance actions with arbitrary swapData
Multiple suspicious transactions draining the protocol
monitoring_rules: BLOCK ANY TX THAT CALLS flashAction() AFTER A FLASH LOAN IN THE SAME TX
summary: The attacker used flash loans to trigger rebalance actions with arbitrary swapData, exploiting the lack of validation for router addresses. A guard could have blocked such transactions to prevent the theft.
